gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/403)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/403)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا تَغْسِلُوا رُءُوسَكُمْ بِطِينِ مِصْرَ فَإِنَّهُ يَذْهَبُ بِالْغَيْرَةِ وَ يُورِثُ الدِّيَاثَةَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ali Bin Asbaat,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Do not wash your heads with Egyptian clay, for it removes the self-esteem and in inherits the despicability’.
en.sarwar: 24. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ibrahim ibn Ishaq from Yusuf ibn al-Sukht in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not lean in a bathhouse; it melts the fat of kidneys. You must not comb in it; it thins out the hairs, do not wash your head with clay; it destroys self-esteem, do not rub (your feet) with pottery; it may cause leprosy and do not wipe your face with loincloths; it destroys the beauty of the face.’”
